sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Tuuno Khazih inah, tua biakna sang phazaw;
A si a manpha ahi a, mawhna phel theita hi.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Upna tawh ka khutte, Nangma lamah kong laam;

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Singlamteh na tungah, Nangmah’n na thuak gimna,

sections.label: Verse 5
lines: Biakna vantung Tuuno, A umte nopsakna;
Ke’n um a ka biak ka nuamzo,
